title: What Do Sobel Filters Actually Do?

filters.name: Sobel-X
filters.description: Subtracts left from right — vertical edges light up

filters.name: Sobel-Y
filters.description: Subtracts top from bottom — horizontal edges light up

combinedDescription: Edge magnitude = √(Gx² + Gy²) — merge both directions for every edge in the image
summary: Same operation, different kernel → completely different result. Blurring and edge detection are both filtering.
